## Description of Project
 This is a simple circuit made using LEDs, Diodes, Resitors and Capacitors in which when the circuit is turned off the X first fades into a Y then into a V then into a . . It works using difference in capacitor storage and diodes. The diodes prevent the capacitor from supplying the other parts of the ciruit when the ciruit is turned off. The leds are divides inot 4 goups according to how they must fade. The first group that fades the earliest has the smallest capacitor, then the second group to fade has a higher capacitor storage of 1mf, they third group has a capacitor storage of 10mf and the fourth group has a capacitor storage of 5mf. Even though the fourth group has a smaller capacitor than the third group it is last to fade as it has only 1 led while the third group has around 16 leds.
